testcase.name: WASM renderer initializes successfully
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › wasm-renderer.smoke.spec.ts:112:5 › WASM renderer initializes successfully ──────────
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
Expected: true Received: undefined
128 | 129 | expect(diagnostics).toBeDefined(); > 130 | expect(diagnostics?.initialized).toBe(true); | ^ 131 | expect(diagnostics?.fps).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0); 132 | expect(diagnostics?.hasModule).toBe(true); 133 | at /app/tests/wasm-renderer.smoke.spec.ts:130:36
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-renderer-initializes-successfully-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-renderer-initializes-successfully-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-renderer-initializes-successfully-chromium/error-context.md
Retry #1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
Expected: true Received: undefined
128 | 129 | expect(diagnostics).toBeDefined(); > 130 | expect(diagnostics?.initialized).toBe(true); | ^ 131 | expect(diagnostics?.fps).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0); 132 | expect(diagnostics?.hasModule).toBe(true); 133 | at /app/tests/wasm-renderer.smoke.spec.ts:130:36
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-renderer-initializes-successfully-chromium-retry1/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-renderer-initializes-successfully-chromium-retry1/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-renderer-initializes-successfully-chromium-retry1/error-context.md

testcase.name: WASM renderer loads single shader without errors
WASM renderer loads multiple shaders (multi-slot stack)
WASM renderer handles shader loading with minimal console errors
WASM renderer collects performance metrics

failure.message: wasm-renderer.smoke.spec.ts:247:5 WASM renderer collects performance metrics

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › wasm-renderer.smoke.spec.ts:247:5 › WASM renderer collects performance metrics ──────
Error: expect(received).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected)
Matcher error: received value must be a number or bigint
Received has value: undefined
284 | 285 | // Assertions > 286 | expect(wasmDiags.wasmFps).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0); | ^ 287 | expect(wasmDiags.wasmHasModule).toBe(true); 288 | }); 289 | at /app/tests/wasm-renderer.smoke.spec.ts:286:29
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-r-b02d2-ollects-performance-metrics-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-r-b02d2-ollects-performance-metrics-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-r-b02d2-ollects-performance-metrics-chromium/error-context.md
Retry #1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error: expect(received).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected)
Matcher error: received value must be a number or bigint
Received has value: undefined
284 | 285 | // Assertions > 286 | expect(wasmDiags.wasmFps).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0); | ^ 287 | expect(wasmDiags.wasmHasModule).toBe(true); 288 | }); 289 | at /app/tests/wasm-renderer.smoke.spec.ts:286:29
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/wasm-renderer.smoke-WASM-r-b02d2-ollects-performance-metrics-chromium-retry1/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
